title: cynoglossum incanum
intro: Cynoglossum incanum, also known as the wolf's mouth or Indian spur flower, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Its health benefits include soothing coughs, reducing fever, and acting as an antispasmodic to ease muscle cramps and spasms. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum incanum is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powders to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
